title: Add ClusterPorts::from_env() for env-test URL configuration
body:
## Summary

### Devloop: 2026-04-07-cluster-ports-from-env
- Implements ADR-0030 step 1: `ClusterPorts::from_env()` reads `ENV_TEST_AC_URL`, `ENV_TEST_GC_URL`, `ENV_TEST_PROMETHEUS_URL`, `ENV_TEST_GRAFANA_URL`, `ENV_TEST_LOKI_URL` as full URLs
- Falls back to current hardcoded localhost defaults when env vars are unset
- MC/MH endpoints come from GC join response, not configuration (per ADR-0030)
- `check_tcp_port` upgraded to use `ToSocketAddrs` for DNS resolution (supports `host.containers.internal`)
- URL validation: rejects non-http/https schemes and credential-bearing URLs
- 20 unit tests with `#[serial]` for env var isolation
- Verdicts: Security CLEAR, Test CLEAR, Observability CLEAR, Code Quality RESOLVED (2/2 fixed), DRY CLEAR, Operations CLEAR

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo test -p env-tests --lib` — 50 tests pass
- [x] `cargo test --workspace` — all workspace tests pass
- [x] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` — clean
- [ ] Manual: set `ENV_TEST_AC_URL=http://some-host:8082` and verify `ClusterConnection::new()` uses it
- [ ] Manual: verify container-side execution with `host.containers.internal` URLs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
